entities.name: SystemParametersInfoA
entities.description: Retrieves or sets the value of one of the system-wide parameters. This function can also update the user profile when setting a parameter.
entities.syntax: BOOL SystemParametersInfoA(   [in]      UINT  uiAction,   [in]      UINT  uiParam,   [in, out] PVOID pvParam,   [in]      UINT  fWinIni);

parameters.name: uiAction
parameters.description: 类型： UINT 要检索或设置的系统范围参数。 可能的值按以下相关参数表进行组织： 辅助功能参数 桌面参数图标参数输入参数菜单参数电源参数 屏幕保护程序参数 超时参数 UI 效果参数窗口参数 下面是辅助功能参数。 辅助功能参数

entities.name: SPI_GETDISABLEOVERLAPPEDCONTENT
entities.description: 系统参数常量，用于确定是否禁用重叠内容。pvParam参数必须指向接收TRUE(如果启用)或FALSE(如果禁用)的BOOL变量。背景图像、纹理背景、水印等显示功能会降低对比度，此标志用于确定此类重叠内容是否已禁用。Windows Server 2003和Windows XP/2000不支持此参数。

entities.name: SPI_GETFOCUSBORDERHEIGHT
entities.description: Retrieves the height of the focus border rectangle for accessibility purposes.

entities.name: SPI_GETHIGHCONTRAST
entities.description: Retrieves the high contrast accessibility settings. Used with SystemParametersInfo function to get information about visual settings for users with visual impairments. Related to SPI_SETHIGHCONTRAST for setting these parameters.

entities.name: SPI_GETLOGICALDPIOVERRIDE
entities.description: Retrieves a value that determines whether Windows 8 uses the hardware's default scaling platform for displaying apps or goes to the next higher platform. This value is based on the current 'Make everything on your screen bigger' setting in the Ease of Access section of PC settings: 1 for on, 0 for off.

entities.name: SPI_GETMOUSECLICKLOCK
entities.description: Retrieves whether Mouse ClickLock is enabled. The pvParam parameter must point to a BOOL variable that receives TRUE if enabled, or FALSE otherwise.

entities.name: SPI_GETSCREENREADER
entities.description: Retrieves whether a screen reviewer utility is running. The screen reviewer utility directs textual information to an output device, such as a speech synthesizer or Braille display.

entities.name: SPI_GETSHOWSOUNDS
entities.description: Retrieves whether the ShowSounds accessibility feature is enabled. The pvParam parameter must point to a BOOL variable that receives TRUE if the feature is on, or FALSE if it is off.

entities.name: SPI_SETMOUSECLICKLOCK
entities.description: Sets whether mouse click lock functionality is enabled. When set to TRUE, enables the feature. For more information, see Mouse Input Overview.

entities.name: SPI_SETDISABLEOVERLAPPEDCONTENT
entities.description: System parameter constant used to disable overlapped content animations. When set, disables animations for overlapping windows content.

entities.name: SPI_SETMESSAGEDURATION
entities.description: Sets the duration for message display animations. The pvParam parameter is a BOOL value. Set pvParam to TRUE to enable animations and transient effects in the workspace, or FALSE to disable them. Windows Server 2003 and Windows XP/2000: This parameter is not supported.

entities.name: SPI_SETMOUSESONAR
entities.description: Sets parameters for the Mouse Sonar accessibility feature. When enabled, circles radiate from the mouse pointer when the Ctrl key is pressed to help locate the pointer on the screen.

entities.name: SPI_SETSERIALKEYS
entities.description: System parameter constant used to configure serial keys accessibility feature. Value: 0x003F. Windows Server 2003 and Windows XP/2000: This parameter is not supported.

entities.name: SPI_SETTOGGLEKEYS
entities.description: Sets the parameters associated with the ToggleKeys accessibility feature

entities.name: SPI_GETCLEARTYPE
entities.description: SPI_GETCLEARTYPE constant (0x1048) retrieves the state of ClearType smoothing. Returns TRUE if ClearType is enabled, FALSE if disabled.

entities.name: SPI_GETDROPSHADOW
entities.description: SPI_GETDROPSHADOW (0x1024) is a system parameter used to determine whether drop shadow effect is enabled for windows. Introduced in Windows Server 2003 and Windows XP/2000.

entities.name: SPI_GETWORKAREA
entities.description: Retrieves the size of the work area on the primary display monitor.

entities.name: ClearType
entities.description: ClearType 是一种微软开发的软件技术，用于提高液晶显示器上文本的可读性，通过子像素渲染技术实现字体平滑效果。

entities.name: FE_FONTSMOOTHINGCLEARTYPE
entities.description: Specifies ClearType font smoothing. Default value is FE_FONTSMOOTHINGSTANDARD. Requires SPI_SETFONTSMOOTHING to be set. Not supported on Windows 2000.

entities.name: SPI_SETCLEARTYPE
entities.description: Determines whether ClearType font smoothing is enabled. The pvParam parameter must point to a BOOL variable that receives TRUE if the feature is enabled, or FALSE if it is not.

entities.name: SPI_SETFONTSMOOTHING
entities.description: System parameter constant for enabling/disabling ClearType font smoothing. The pvParam parameter must point to a BOOL value (TRUE to enable ClearType, FALSE to disable it).

entities.name: SPI_SETFONTSMOOTHINGCONTRAST
entities.description: Sets the font smoothing contrast value. Not supported on Windows Server 2003 and Windows XP/2000.

entities.name: SPI_SETWORKAREA
entities.description: System parameter used with SystemParametersInfo function to set the size of the work area

entities.name: FE_FONTSMOOTHINGORIENTATIONBGR
entities.description: Specifies Blue-Green-Red font smoothing orientation (BGR). Alternative to FE_FONTSMOOTHINGORIENTATIONRGB (Red-Green-Blue). Windows XP/2000: Not supported prior to Windows XP SP2.

entities.name: SPI_ICONHORIZONTALSPACING
entities.description: Sets the horizontal spacing between icons. The pvParam parameter specifies the spacing value.

entities.name: SPI_SETICONTITLEWRAP
entities.description: 用于打开或关闭图标标题环绕。uiParam 参数为 TRUE 表示开启，FALSE 表示关闭。

entities.name: SPI_GETDEFAULTINPUTLANG
entities.description: 检索系统默认输入语言的输入区域设置标识符。pvParam参数必须指向接收此值的HKL变量。有关详细信息，请参阅语言、区域设置和键盘布局。

entities.name: SPI_GETKEYBOARDCUES
entities.description: System parameter constant (0x100A) that determines whether keyboard cues are enabled. The pvParam parameter must point to a BOOL variable that receives TRUE if keyboard cues are enabled, or FALSE if disabled.

entities.name: SPI_GETMOUSETRAILS
entities.description: Retrieves the mouse trails setting. The pvParam parameter must point to a ULONG variable that receives the setting.

entities.name: MOUSEWHEEL_ROUTING_HYBRID
entities.description: 鼠标滚轮路由模式的常量值，表示混合路由模式。

entities.name: SPI_SETGESTUREVISUALIZATION
entities.description: Sets the current gesture visualization settings. The pvParam parameter must point to a ULONG variable that identifies the settings. Note: If contact visualization effects are disabled, gesture visualization effects cannot be enabled.

entities.name: SPI_SETMOUSEHOVERHEIGHT
entities.description: Sets the height of the rectangle within which the mouse pointer has to stay for TrackMouseEvent to generate a WM_MOUSEHOVER message.

entities.name: SPI_SETMOUSEHOVERTIME
entities.description: Sets the time hover should wait before displaying a menu. The pvParam parameter specifies the hover time in milliseconds.

entities.name: SPI_SETPENVISUALIZATION
entities.description: Sets the pen visualization setting (0x201F). Used with SystemParametersInfo function.

entities.name: SPI_SETSYSTEMLANGUAGEBAR
entities.description: System parameter used to set the system language bar configuration.

entities.name: SPI_SETWHEELSCROLLLINES
entities.description: Sets the number of lines to scroll when the vertical mouse wheel is moved. The number of lines is set from the uiParam parameter. This is the suggested number of lines to scroll when the mouse wheel is rotated without modifier keys. If the number is 0, no scrolling should occur.

entities.name: SPI_GETMENUSHOWDELAY
entities.description: Retrieves the time, in milliseconds, that the system waits before displaying a cascading menu when the mouse cursor is over a submenu item.

entities.name: SPI_SETMENUANIMATION
entities.description: Determines whether menu animation is enabled. The pvParam parameter must point to a BOOL variable that receives TRUE if enabled or FALSE if disabled.

entities.name: SPI_SETMENUSHOWDELAY
entities.description: Sets the time that the system waits before displaying a shortcut menu when the mouse cursor is over a submenu item. The pvParam parameter must point to a DWORD variable that receives the delay time in milliseconds.

entities.name: SPI_MENUANIMATION
entities.description: System parameter constant that controls menu animation behavior. When set, enables or disables menu animation effects.

entities.name: SPI_GETLOWPOWERACTIVE
entities.description: System parameter constant used to determine if the low-power phase of screen saving is enabled. Not supported on Windows Server 2003 and Windows XP/2000.

entities.name: SPI_GETPOWEROFFACTIVE
entities.description: Determines whether the low-power phase of screen saving is enabled. The pvParam parameter must point to a BOOL variable that receives TRUE if enabled, or FALSE if disabled. This flag is supported only for 32-bit applications.

entities.name: GUID_VIDEO_POWERDOWN_TIMEOUT
entities.description: 电源管理设置常量，用于检索或设置屏幕保护程序电源关闭阶段的超时值。仅支持32位应用程序。

entities.name: SPI_SETPOWEROFFTIMEOUT
entities.description: System parameter used with SystemParametersInfo function. When set, specifies the timeout value for the power-off phase of screen saving (32-bit applications only). The pvParam parameter must point to an integer variable that receives the value.

entities.name: SPI_GETSCREENSAVEACTIVE
entities.description: System parameter constant used with SystemParametersInfo function to determine whether screen saving is enabled

entities.name: SPI_SETSCREENSAVESECURE
entities.description: System parameter constant used with SystemParametersInfo function. Value: 0x0077. Determines whether screen saver is secure. pvParam parameter must point to a BOOL variable that receives TRUE if screen saver is secure, FALSE otherwise. Only supported for 32-bit applications.

entities.name: SPI_SETSCREENSAVETIMEOUT
entities.description: Sets the screen saver timeout value in seconds

entities.name: SPI_GETHUNGAPPTIMEOUT
entities.description: Retrieves the time-out value for hung applications. The pvParam parameter must point to an integer variable that receives the value.

entities.name: SPI_SETWAITTOKILLSERVICETIMEOUT
entities.description: Sets the timeout value (in milliseconds) that the service control manager waits before terminating a service that does not respond to shutdown requests. The uiParam parameter specifies the timeout value.

entities.name: SPI_GETCURSORSHADOW
entities.description: 用于确定光标周围是否有阴影的系统参数。pvParam 参数必须指向一个 BOOL 变量，该变量在启用阴影时接收 TRUE，禁用时为 FALSE。仅当系统的颜色深度超过 256 种颜色时才会显示此效果。

entities.name: SPI_GETSELECTIONFADE
entities.description: Determines whether the selection fade effect is enabled. The pvParam parameter must point to a BOOL variable that receives TRUE if enabled or FALSE if disabled.

entities.name: SPI_GETTOOLTIPFADE
entities.description: 指示工具提示动画是使用淡化效果还是幻灯片效果。pvParam参数必须指向一个BOOL变量，该变量对于淡出动画接收TRUE，对于幻灯片动画接收FALSE。

entities.name: SPI_SETCOMBOBOXANIMATION
entities.description: Determines whether combo box animation is enabled. The pvParam parameter must point to a BOOL variable that receives TRUE if enabled or FALSE if disabled.

entities.name: SPI_SETTOOLTIPFADE
entities.description: 指定淡出动画或幻灯片动画。如果启用了 SPI_SETTOOLTIPANIMATION 标志，使用此常量来指示 ToolTip 动画是使用淡化效果还是幻灯片效果。对于淡化动画，将 pvParam 设置为 TRUE，幻灯片动画设置为 FALSE。仅当系统的颜色深度超过 256 种颜色时，才能实现工具提示淡出效果。

entities.name: SPI_SETUIEFFECTS
entities.description: System parameter constant (0x103F) that enables/disables various UI effects including cursor shadow, gradient title bars, hot tracking, smooth scrolling and menu animations. pvParam must be TRUE/FALSE. Effects only visible when system color depth exceeds 256 colors.

entities.name: SPI_GETANIMATION
entities.description: 系统参数常量，用于获取窗口动画设置。与SPI_GETMENUFADE和SPI_SETKEYBOARDCUES相关。

entities.name: SPI_GETFOREGROUNDFLASHCOUNT
entities.description: System parameter constant used with SystemParametersInfo function. Determines the number of times the taskbar button flashes when a window requires attention.

entities.name: SPI_GETMOUSEDOCKTHRESHOLD
entities.description: Retrieves the threshold for mouse docking behavior. The pvParam parameter must point to an integer variable that receives the value.

entities.name: SPI_GETMOUSEDRAGOUTTHRESHOLD
entities.description: Retrieves the threshold for dragging the mouse out of a window

entities.name: SPI_GETPENDOCKTHRESHOLD
entities.description: Retrieves the threshold (in pixels) for triggering dock behavior when dragging a window to the edge of a monitor or monitor array using the mouse. The default threshold is 1. The pvParam parameter must point to a DWORD variable that receives the value. Use SPI_GETWINARRANGING to determine whether this behavior is enabled. Not supported on Windows Server 2008, Windows Vista, Windows Server 2003, and Windows XP/2000.

entities.name: SPI_GETPENDRAGOUTTHRESHOLD
entities.description: Retrieves the threshold value for pen drag-out gestures. Not supported on Windows Server 2008, Windows Vista, Windows Server 2003 and Windows XP/2000.

entities.name: SPI_GETWINARRANGING
entities.description: Retrieves whether window arranging is enabled. Returns TRUE if enabled, FALSE otherwise.

entities.name: SPI_SETACTIVEWNDTRKZORDER
entities.description: Determines whether active window tracking (z-order behavior) is enabled. The pvParam parameter must point to a BOOL variable that receives TRUE if enabled, or FALSE otherwise.

entities.name: SPI_SETCARETWIDTH
entities.description: Sets the caret width in edit controls. The pvParam parameter specifies the caret width in pixels.

entities.name: SPI_SETFOREGROUNDLOCKTIMEOUT
entities.description: System parameter used to set the foreground lock timeout. When set, pvParam specifies the timeout value in milliseconds.

entities.name: SPI_SETMOUSEDOCKTHRESHOLD
entities.description: 设置在将窗口移动到监视器或监视器阵列上的顶部、左侧或右侧停靠目标时，窗口是否停靠。对于启用，将pvParam设置为TRUE；对于禁用，则设置为FALSE。

entities.name: SPI_SETMOUSEDRAGOUTTHRESHOLD
entities.description: Sets the threshold for dragging the mouse out of a window.

entities.name: SPI_SETPENDRAGOUTTHRESHOLD
entities.description: System parameter constant used with SystemParametersInfo function to set the threshold for pen drag-out detection.

entities.name: SPI_SETWINARRANGING
entities.description: Sets the threshold (in pixels) at the top of the monitor where vertically maximized windows will restore when dragged with a pen. Default threshold is 50. The pvParam parameter must point to a DWORD variable containing the new value.

entities.name: SPIF_UPDATEINIFILE
entities.description: Specifies that the changes should be written to the user profile and broadcast WM_SETTINGCHANGE message

entities.name: SystemParametersInfoForDPI
entities.description: Retrieves or sets the value of a system-wide parameter, accounting for the DPI of the caller.

entities.name: SystemParametersInfoW
entities.description: Retrieves or sets the value of one of the system-wide parameters. This function can also update the user profile when setting a parameter.
entities.syntax: BOOL SystemParametersInfoW(   [in]      UINT  uiAction,   [in]      UINT  uiParam,   [in, out] PVOID pvParam,   [in]      UINT  fWinIni);

parameters.name: uiAction
parameters.description: 类型： UINT 要检索或设置的系统范围参数。 可能的值在相关参数的下表中组织： 辅助功能参数 桌面参数图标参数输入参数菜单参数电源参数 屏幕保护程序参数 超时参数 UI 效果参数 窗口参数 下面是辅助功能参数。辅助功能参数

entities.name: SCALE_140_PERCENT
entities.description: 缩放值常量，表示140%的缩放比例。注意：不应直接使用此值，在Windows后续版本中可能变更或不可用。建议使用GetScaleFactorForDevice函数替代。

entities.name: FE_FONTSMOOTHINGSTANDARD
entities.description: Font smoothing constant used with SystemParametersInfo. Works with FE_FONTSMOOTHINGCLEARTYPE. Windows 2000: Not supported.

entities.name: COLOR_HILIGHT
entities.description: Specifies the highlight color for menu selection outlines. If disabled, menus are drawn using the same metrics and colors as in Windows 2000.

entities.name: WM_MOUSEHOVER
entities.description: WM_MOUSEHOVER 消息在鼠标指针悬停在窗口客户区上方指定的时间内发送。使用 TrackMouseEvent 函数可以请求此消息。

entities.name: TrackMouseEvent
entities.description: Tracks mouse events for a window and posts messages when the mouse leaves the window or hovers over the window for a specified amount of time.

entities.name: WHEEL_PAGESCROLL
entities.description: When defined as UINT_MAX, indicates that a wheel scroll operation should be interpreted as a single click in the page down or page up region of a scroll bar.

entities.name: TileWindows
entities.description: 平铺指定父窗口的指定子窗口。
entities.syntax: WORD WINAPI TileWindows(HWND hwndParent, UINT wHow, const RECT *lpRect, UINT cKids, const HWND *lpKids);

parameters.name: hwndParent
parameters.description: 类型：HWND 父窗口的句柄。 如果此参数为 NULL，则假定为桌面窗口。

parameters.name: wHow
parameters.description: 类型： UINT 平铺标志。 此参数可以是以下值之一， 可以选择与 MDITILE_SKIPDISABLED 组合，以防止平铺已禁用的 MDI 子窗口。 值

entities.name: MDITILE_VERTICAL
entities.description: Specifies vertical tiling of MDI child windows.

entities.name: STATE_SYSTEM_FOCUSABLE
entities.description: Indicates that the object can accept the focus

entities.name: STATE_SYSTEM_INVISIBLE
entities.description: Indicates the element is invisible

entities.name: STATE_SYSTEM_OFFSCREEN
entities.description: Indicates that an object is clipped or has scrolled out of view (off-screen)

entities.name: STATE_SYSTEM_UNAVAILABLE
entities.description: Indicates the element is unavailable

entities.name: STATE_SYSTEM_PRESSED
entities.description: 表示元素处于按下状态的系统状态常量。值为0x00000008。

entities.name: WM_SYSKEYDOWN
entities.description: WM_SYSKEYDOWN 是与 WM_SYSKEYUP 组合使用的系统按键消息，用于生成 WM_SYSCHAR 或 WM_SYSDEADCHAR 消息。当系统键被按下时发送此消息。

entities.name: WM_SYSDEADCHAR
entities.description: WM_SYSDEADCHAR 是一个 Windows 消息常量，当用户按住 ALT 键并按下死键时发送。该消息表示系统死键字符。

entities.name: UnregisterClassA
entities.description: 取消注册窗口类并释放相关内存资源。

parameters.name: lpClassName
parameters.description: 类型：LPCTSTR 以 null 结尾的字符串或类原子。 如果 lpClassName 是字符串，则指定窗口类名。 此类名称必须由上一次对 RegisterClass 或 RegisterClassEx 函数的调用进行注册。 无法取消注册系统类（如对话框控件）。 如果此参数是 atom，则它必须是上一次调用 RegisterClass 或 RegisterClassEx 函数创建的类 atom。 原子必须位于 lpClassName的低序单词中;高序单词必须为零。

parameters.name: hInstance
parameters.description: 类型：HINSTANCE 创建类的模块实例的句柄。

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回值为非零。 如果找不到该类，或者如果该类创建窗口仍然存在，则返回值为零。 若要获取扩展的错误信 息，请调用 GetLastError。

entities.remarks: 调用此函数前必须销毁所有使用该类的窗口。应用程序注册的所有窗口类在终止时会自动注销。DLL注册的窗口类在DLL卸载时不会自动注销。

entities.name: UnregisterClassW
entities.description: 取消注册窗口类并释放相关资源。调用此函数前必须销毁该类的所有窗口。

parameters.name: lpClassName
parameters.description: 类型：LPCTSTR 以 null 结尾的字符串或类原子。 如果 lpClassName 是字符串，则指定窗口类名。 此类名称必须由上一次对 RegisterClass 或 RegisterClassEx 函数的调用进行注册。 无法取消注册系统类（如对话框控件）。 如果此参数是 atom，则它必须是上一次调用 RegisterClass 或 RegisterClassEx 函数创建的类 atom。 原子必须位于 lpClassName的低序单词中;高序单词必须为零。

parameters.name: hInstance
parameters.description: 类型：HINSTANCE 创建类的模块实例的句柄。

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回值为非零。 如果找不到该类，或者如果该类创建窗口仍然存在，则返回值为零。 若要获取扩展的错误信息，请调用 GetLastError。

entities.remarks: 调用此函数前必须销毁使用指定类创建的所有窗口。应用程序注册的所有窗口类在终止时将自动取消注册。类原子是由 RegisterClass 或 RegisterClassEx 返回的特殊原子。DLL 注册的窗口类在 DLL 卸载时不会自动注销。

entities.name: ULW_ALPHA
entities.description: Flag value (0x00000002) indicating to use pblend as the blending function. If the display mode is 256 colors or less, this flag has the same effect as ULW_OPAQUE.

entities.name: ULW_COLORKEY
entities.description: Specifies that the color key should be used when updating layered windows

entities.name: ULW_EX_NORESIZE
entities.description: 0x00000008 flag for UpdateLayeredWindowIndirect. Prevents window resizing during update.

return_value.description: 如果该函数成功，则返回值为非零值。 如果函数失败，则返回值为零。 要获得更多的错误信息，请调用 GetLastError。

entities.remarks: 源 DC 应包含定义分层窗口的可见内容的图面。 例如，可以在通过调用 CreateCompatibleDC 函数获取的设备上下文中选择位图。 应用程序应在 hdcSrc 设备上下文中调用 SetLayout 以正确设置镜像模式。 SetLayout 将正确镜像所有绘图到 HDC 中，同时正确保留文本字形， (可以选择) 位图方向顺序。 它无法将绘图直接修改为与设备无关的位图 (DIB) 位。 有关详细信息，请参阅 窗口布局和镜像。

entities.name: UpdateLayeredWindowIndirect
entities.description: Updates the position, size, shape, content and translucency of a layered window.
entities.syntax:
typedef struct tagUPDATELAYEREDWINDOWINFO {
DWORD               cbSize;   HDC                 hdcDst;   const POINT         *pptDst;   const SIZE          *psize;   HDC                 hdcSrc;   const POINT         *pptSrc;   COLORREF            crKey;   const BLENDFUNCTION *pblend;   DWORD               dwFlags;   const RECT          *prcDirty;
} UPDATELAYEREDWINDOWINFO, *PUPDATELAYEREDWINDOWINFO;
成员 cbSize
类型：DWORD
此结构的大小（以字节为单位）。 hdcDst
类型： HDC
屏幕 DC 的句柄。 调用 UpdateLayeredWindowIndirect 时，通过在成员中指定 NULL 来获取此句柄。 当更新窗口内容时，句柄用于调色板颜色匹配。 如果 hdcDst 为 NULL，则使用默认调色板。
如果 hdcSrc 为 NULL， 则 hdcDst 必须为 NULL。 pptDst
类型： const POINT*
分层窗口的新屏幕位置。 如果新位置与当前位置保持不变， 则 pptDst 可以为 NULL。 psize
类型： const SIZE*
分层窗口的新大小。 如果窗口的大小不会更改，则此参数可以为 NULL。 如果 hdcSrc 为
NULL， 则 psize 必须为 NULL。 hdcSrc
类型： HDC
定义分层窗口的图面 DC 的句柄。 可以通过调用 CreateCompatibleDC 函数来获取此句
柄。 如果窗口的形状和视觉上下文不会更改， 则 hdcSrc 可以为 NULL。 pptSrc
类型： const POINT*
层在设备上下文中的位置。 如果 hdcSrc 为 NULL， 则 pptSrc 应为 NULL。 crKey
类型： COLORREF
组合分层窗口时要使用的颜色键。 若要生成 COLORREF，请使用 RGB 宏。 pblend
类型： const BLENDFUNCTION* 组合分层窗口时要使用的透明度值。 dwFlags
类型：DWORD
此参数的取值可为下列值之一：
值

entities.name: MsgWaitForMultipleObjects
entities.description: 和 MsgWaitForMultipleObjectsEx 等函数检查队列，然后更改队列的状态信息，使输入不再被视为新输入。 在指定类型的新输入到达之前，对 WaitMessage 的后 续调用不会返回。 在线程上次检查队列) 之前收到的现有未读输入 (将被忽略。
entities.syntax:
HWND WindowFromPhysicalPoint(
[in] POINT Point);

return_value.description: 包含给定物理点的窗口的句柄。 如果此时不存在任何窗口，则此值为 NULL。

entities.name: WPF_RESTORETOMAXIMIZED
entities.description: Window placement flag (value 0x0002). If the calling thread and the thread that owns the window are attached to different input queues, the system posts the request to the thread that owns the window. This prevents the calling thread from blocking its execution while other threads process the request. Restores a window to maximized state regardless of whether it was maximized before minimization. This setting only takes effect the next time the window is restored and does not change default restore behavior.

entities.name: WPF_SETMINPOSITION
entities.description: Window placement flag (0x0001) indicating that minimized window coordinates are specified. Only valid when showCmd is SW_SHOWMINIMIZED. Coordinates must be specified in ptMinPosition member.
